Eziz Berdiyev Frontend developer

About me

Eziz Berdiyev

Frontend Developer focused on building modern web applications, scalable interfaces, and user-focused digital products. Experienced in developing responsive frontend solutions, interactive UI systems, API integrations, and adaptive interfaces for modern web platforms. Worked on commercial products, including applications for Alfa Insurance (OMS), contributing to frontend architecture, UI implementation, business logic, and user experience improvements. Focused on clean design systems, performance, scalability, and modern development workflows.

Experience

FREELANCE

April, 2024 - May, 2025
Developed responsive websites and modern frontend interfaces for various projects and clients. Built adaptive layouts, interactive UI elements, animations, and user-focused interfaces optimized for usability and cross-device compatibility. Worked with modern frontend workflows, API integrations, and interface implementation based on design systems and product requirements.

LLC “CONTINENTAL”

June, 2025 - September, 2025
Developed and improved frontend interfaces for web applications and digital products, including commercial solutions for Alfa Insurance (OMS). Worked on responsive UI implementation, business logic, API integrations, animations, and interactive user flows. Collaborated with backend developers and product teams to improve usability, scalability, and overall user experience across modern web platforms.
